properties.Name of the Tank: Spring at the tea plantation of the Middle division of 2nd mile post
properties.Observation: An anicut is built to intercept the water flowing from the spring located in the middle of the second mile post, providing water for about sixty families.
properties.Description:
Construction of a Water Stock Tank with a Filter System (3.0m x2.0m x 2.0m)

Site preparation & setting out

Plywood form work including making, fixing & removing for structure ?05 uses

Cutting, Bending & Placing tor steel reinforcement bars

properties.Name of the Tank: Spring at the lower division of the tea plantation of 'C' division
properties.Observation: An anicut is built at the source, and water is collected in a water storage tank and distributed to about thirty families. The 50mm diameter pipe, which runs for a distance of 500m from the source to the water storage tank, is in a dilapidated condition.
properties.Description:
50mm dia PvC pipe in Solvent Socket Type in PNT11 -To connect the water source and tank

Miscellaneous

Contingencies (10%)

properties.Name of the Tank: The spring that is located in the reserve above the temple at the 3rd mile post
properties.Observation: A concrete dam 3.0m long and 0.6m high has been constructed and an anicut has been prepared to collect the water flowing from the spring. Water is being provided to eighteen families.
properties.Description:
Construction of a Water Stock Tank  (2.0m x2.0m x 1.5m)

Site preparation & setting out

Plywood form work including making, fixing & removing for structure ?05 uses

Cutting, Bending & Placing tor steel reinforcement bars
